title: Marinated Melted Jamaican Chicken Kebabs
description: A pungent and flavorful Jamaican dish featuring marinated chicken, melted cheese, and tarragon leaves, perfect for a sugar-free friendly meal prep option.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, jamaican jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat and thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Grill the chicken kebabs for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, melt the monterey jack cheese in a copper mug over low heat.
Once the chicken is done, brush with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped scallions and tarragon leaves.
Serve the chicken kebabs with the melted cheese and garnish with additional tarragon leaves if desired.
